title: himantoglossum jankae var. calcaratum
intro: Himantoglossum jankae var. calcaratum is a rare and endangered species of orchid, specifically a variant of the Himantoglossum jankae orchid, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Himantoglossum jankae var. calcaratum or its herbal preparations may have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving antioxidant status, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional folk medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
